# Documentation & Knowledge Share Structure Plan

## 1. Project Documentation

- **overview.md**: Project purpose, vision, and goals
- **setup.md**: How to set up and run the project
- **contribution.md**: How to contribute, style guide, PR process
- **faq.md**: Frequently asked questions

## 2. Knowledge Base

- **unix.md**: UNIX/Linux tips, commands, troubleshooting
- **web.md**: Web development basics, HTML/CSS/JS, best practices
- **programming.md**: Code snippets, algorithms, data structures
- **system-design.md**: System design principles, architecture patterns
- **best-practices.md**: Coding, security, and deployment best practices

## 3. Articles & Guides

- **articles/**: Folder for in-depth articles and tutorials
- **case-studies/**: Real-world examples and case studies

## 4. Navigation & Linking

- Update sidebar and homepage to link all docs and guides

## 5. About & Usage

- Add "About Project" and "How to Use" sections to homepage and docs

---

# Next Steps

- [ ] Create initial markdown files for each section
- [ ] Add navigation links in sidebar and homepage
- [ ] Replace placeholder/sample content with real guides
- [ ] Expand UNIX and technical topics
- [ ] Write contribution and FAQ docs
